channel.title: Democratic Integrity on Asymmetric Intelligence
channel.description: Recent content in Democratic Integrity on Asymmetric Intelligence

item.title: World Democracy Monitor — 30 March 2026
item.description: V-Dem 2026 records the largest single-year LDI decline in US history; CPAC Hungary 2026 (51 countries, March 21) formally networked Georgian Dream alongside Fidesz, Milei, AfD and Vox; and Uganda’s terrorism-framed NGO funding framework extends the anti-civil-society legislative wave to East Africa ahead of presidential elections.
